title: Buying Eva in other languages
wikitext:
[]: Buying Eva in other languages             Quote Post by chaosakita » Tue Jul 30, 2013 6:10 pm Would anyone know how one would go about buying Eva dubs in other languages? I think it would be a great way of refining my Spanish or Chinese skills. I know in particular Chinese has various bootleg dubs available, but I'm not sure where I would find Eva specifically.

[]:             Quote Post by Veefy » Wed Jul 31, 2013 7:32 am Info on the Spanish and catalan dub here for death and rebirth, there's also a Spanish and catalan dub for end of evangelion http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/anime.php?id=418 http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/anime.php?id=419 I found low quality video versions of the Spanish dub of both of these YouTube if you want to preview what they are like before purchasing. Ok a Spanish and Catalan dub exists of the original series. http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/anime.php?id=49 From the looks of it those Spanish companies showed it on tv, Ok the perfect collection adv has a Spanish stereo track.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 31, 2013 10:31 am This made me curious about finding info about a Polish dub. For the new movies, I know 1.0 was brought over to Poland (no 2.0 or 3.0?), but what about the original series? Is Eva considered controversial in Poland because of Eva's religious symbolism? For that matter, are foreign programs in Poland dubbed or do they still use a lektor ? And I wonder how often foreign programs are subtitled in Poland? Some amusing stuff: I found a Polish film site that linked back to EGF's 3.0 FAQ in a 3.0 thread of theirs. And Google translated something about "I'm not a heavy American nerd" in one of their 3.0 threads.

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Wed Jul 31, 2013 10:45 am I've been looking for a complete Chinese dub for quite some time. I don't think the acting is very good but I'm just interested in seeing how they render the script.

[]:             Quote Post by Catamari » Wed Jul 31, 2013 10:55 am I'll keep an eye out for Chinese and Polish dubs. I'm on foreign Amazon a lot. If anyone can find a cheap German dub, I will be very grateful. I have 1.11, 2.22, and EoE in Deutsch, but not the series.

[]:             Quote Post by tzigi » Wed Jul 31, 2013 3:11 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: This made me curious about finding info about a Polish dub. For the new movies, I know 1.0 was brought over to Poland (no 2.0 or 3.0?), but what about the original series? Is Eva considered controversial in Poland because of Eva's religious symbolism? For that matter, are foreign programs in Poland dubbed or do they still use a lektor ? And I wonder how often foreign programs are subtitled in Poland?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 31, 2013 3:48 pm tzigi wrote: As a Pole I'll gladly provide you with answers
